questions.question: When is `PropType<T>` from Vue needed for typing component props?
options: Always, when using `<script setup>` with TypeScript
Only with the Options API or runtime prop declarations, not type-based `defineProps`
When using composables that accept props as arguments
Only when the prop type is a generic

questions.question: What is the difference between `MaybeRef<T>` and `MaybeRefOrGetter<T>`?
options: They are identical: just different naming conventions
`MaybeRefOrGetter<T>` only accepts getter functions, not plain values
`MaybeRef<T>` is for computed refs; `MaybeRefOrGetter<T>` is for watch sources
